name: Taverna del Porto
tagline: Flavours of the sea from the heart of Calabria
description: Seafood restaurant with sea view in Tropea, Calabria. Traditional cuisine since 1985.
whatsappMessage: Hi! I'd like to book a table at Taverna del Porto.

practicalInfo.parking: Public parking 100m away (Via Marina). In summer we recommend arriving early.
practicalInfo.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible entrance. Accessible bathroom. High chairs available.
practicalInfo.coverCharge: Cover charge: €2.50 per person (includes bread, breadsticks and water).

chef.name: Marco Ferraro
chef.title: Chef & Owner
chef.bio: Third generation of fishermen, first generation of chefs. Marco brought his family's tradition into the kitchen, blending his grandmother's recipes with the contemporary flavours of the Mediterranean.
